description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Upload to TestPyPI that triggers on push to main, on pull requests to any branch with specific types and labels, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two ubuntu-latest jobs: build-artifacts which checks out code, sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies, builds artifacts, checks them, and uploads to TestPyPI; and test-built-dist which depends on build-artifacts, downloads artifacts, lists their contents, and verifies the built wheel.
